extraction.one_line_summary: GROENEWEGEN Dylan won a sprint finish barely holding off EWAN Caleb after Team Jumbo-Visma delivered him perfectly positioned through the final kilometer
tactical_patterns: MØRKØV Michael led out through final kilometer allowing Deceuninck Quick-Step's VIVIANI Elia third wheel positioning before peeling off late
SAGAN Peter lost positioning mid-sprint when teammateOSS Daniel advanced without him, forcing sagan to find gaps later
Team Jumbo-Visma controlled entire final kilometer setup, with JANSE VAN RENSBURG Reinardt doing heavy work before final leadout
EWAN Caleb timed finish rush perfectly from worse position, nearly overcoming GROENEWEGEN Dylan's superior leadout advantage

rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: crashed into roadside barrier at 7km losing 2 minutes, suffered facial bleeding and required medical assessment before continuing
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: positive: demonstrated precise positioning discipline staying in top-10 wheel positions through final 3km as planned
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: neutral: secured optimal third-wheel position behind MØRKØV Michael leadout but lacked final acceleration to contest podium
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: positioning error when separated fromOSS Daniel's forward move forced him to navigate through traffic mid-sprint
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: positive: overcame suboptimal positioning to nearly win, showing superior acceleration capacity from worse wheel than winner
